blended.narrative: Deer Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,621 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 5.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 45".
